entry.title: Coronavirus : IIT, AIIMS की स्टडी में दावा,मॉनसून,सर्दियों में बढ़ सकता है कोरोना वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Coronavirus : IIT, AIIMS की स्टडी में दावा,मॉनसून,सर्दियों में बढ़ सकता है कोरोना वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Corona virus infection is now increasing very fast in the country every day. Records of new cases of infection are being made everyday. The results of a study by IIT-Bhubaneswar and AIIMS among the increasing cases of Corona are even more disturbing. In this study, it has been claimed that due to the drop in temperature during the monsoon and winter season, corona virus cases can increase rapidly. According to research, as the mercury falls, the rate of infection will increase significantly and may reach its peak.
कोरोना वायरस संक्रमण देश में अब हर रोज काफी तेजी से बढ़ रहा है। हर रोज संक्रमण के नए मामलों के रिकॉर्ड बन रहे हैं। कोरोना के बढ़ते मामलों के बीच IIT-भुवनेश्वर और एम्स की एक स्टडी के नतीजे और भी परेशान करने वाले हैं. इस स्टडी में दावा किया गया है कि मॉनसून और सर्दियों के मौसम में तापमान में गिरावट की वजह से कोरोना वायरस के मामले तेजी से बढ़ सकते हैं. रिसर्च के अनुसार पारा गिरने के साथ ही संक्रमण की दर में काफी बढ़ोतरी होगी और ये अपने चरम पर पहुंच सकता है।
#Coronavirus #Covid19 #IIT #AIIMS
entry.summary: Corona virus infection is now increasing very fast in the country every day. Records of new cases of infection are being made everyday. The results of a study by IIT-Bhubaneswar and AIIMS among the increasing cases of Corona are even more disturbing. In this study, it has been claimed that due to the drop in temperature during the monsoon and winter season, corona virus cases can increase rapidly. According to research, as the mercury falls, the rate of infection will increase significantly and may reach its peak. कोरोना वायरस संक्रमण देश में अब हर रोज काफी तेजी से बढ़ रहा है। हर रोज संक्रमण के नए मामलों के रिकॉर्ड बन रहे हैं। कोरोना के बढ़ते मामलों के बीच IIT-भुवनेश्वर और एम्स की एक स्टडी के नतीजे और भी परेशान करने वाले हैं. इस स्टडी में दावा किया गया है कि मॉनसून और सर्दियों के मौसम में तापमान में गिरावट की वजह से कोरोना वायरस के मामले तेजी से बढ़ सकते हैं. रिसर्च के अनुसार पारा गिरने के साथ ही संक्रमण की दर में काफी बढ़ोतरी होगी और ये अपने चरम पर पहुंच सकता है। #Coronavirus #Covid19 #IIT #AIIMS

entry.content:
Santino Caravella Ft. Mama Marjas & Orlando Johnson - Viva la nostra Puglia
(M.Germinario, S.Caravella,N.Panza)
Prodotto da Panico DJ
Regia di Michele Creta
D. O. P. & color grading di Warning Film
Supporto tecnico di Roberto Caravella
Distribuito da Love University Records
Il videoclip di Viva La Nostra Puglia è anche sul canale 216 del digitale terrestre e 5216 di Sky in tutta la Puglia

www.mamamarjas.com
www.loveuniversityrecords.com

entry.title: Dhoni ಜೊತೆ ಆಡೋದು ತುಂಬಾ ಖುಷಿ ಕೊಡುತ್ತೆ ಎಂದ Pant Oneindia Kannada

link.title: Dhoni ಜೊತೆ ಆಡೋದು ತುಂಬಾ ಖುಷಿ ಕೊಡುತ್ತೆ ಎಂದ Pant Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
ಟೀಮ್ ಇಂಡಿಯಾದಲ್ಲಿ ನೆಲೆಯೂರಲು ಪರದಾಡುತ್ತಿರುವ ಯುವ ಬ್ಯಾಟ್ಸ್‌ಮನ್ ಕಮ್ ವಿಕೆಟ್ ಕೀಪರ್ ರಿಷಭ್ ಪಂತ್ ಟೀಮ್ ಇಂಡಿಯಾದಲ್ಲಿ ತನಗೆ ಹೆಚ್ಚು ಇಷ್ಟವಾಗುವ ಬ್ಯಾಟ್ಸ್‌ಮನ್‌ ಹೆಸರಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ.
Rishabh Pant in an online interaction with his IPL franchise Delhi Capitals revealed that his favourite batting partner is MS Dhoni.
entry.summary: ಟೀಮ್ ಇಂಡಿಯಾದಲ್ಲಿ ನೆಲೆಯೂರಲು ಪರದಾಡುತ್ತಿರುವ ಯುವ ಬ್ಯಾಟ್ಸ್‌ಮನ್ ಕಮ್ ವಿಕೆಟ್ ಕೀಪರ್ ರಿಷಭ್ ಪಂತ್ ಟೀಮ್ ಇಂಡಿಯಾದಲ್ಲಿ ತನಗೆ ಹೆಚ್ಚು ಇಷ್ಟವಾಗುವ ಬ್ಯಾಟ್ಸ್‌ಮನ್‌ ಹೆಸರಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ. Rishabh Pant in an online interaction with his IPL franchise Delhi Capitals revealed that his favourite batting partner is MS Dhoni.

entry.title: Anti-government protests see scuffles with police in Bangkok, Thailand

link.title: Anti-government protests see scuffles with police in Bangkok, Thailand

entry.content:
Angry protesters gathered in Bangkok July 18 in a rally against the Thai military government.
Hundreds of demonstrators gathered at the Democracy Monument in the capital chanting Get Out towards the regime lead by General Prayuth Chan-o-cha.
They were angry at the lack of transparency, accountability and democracy in the country - tensions that have built over several years since the controversial military leadership seized power following a coup in 2014 and won an election in 2019.
There were some scuffles as police battled to contain the crowd with metal barriers but they were quickly calmed down.
Many of the protesters held up a three finger salute - adapted from the Hunger Games movie - and wore black shirts as a sign of mourning for democracy. There were then several speakers.
Later in the evening they held up mobile phone lights in a show of solidarity against the regime before being dispersed by police shortly before midnight. Leaders vowed to stage further rallies in the coming weeks - in defiance of the country’s Covid-19 coronavirus ban on large gatherings.
entry.summary: Angry protesters gathered in Bangkok July 18 in a rally against the Thai military government. Hundreds of demonstrators gathered at the Democracy Monument in the capital chanting Get Out towards the regime lead by General Prayuth Chan-o-cha. They were angry at the lack of transparency, accountability and democracy in the country - tensions that have built over several years since the controversial military leadership seized power following a coup in 2014 and won an election in 2019. There were some scuffles as police battled to contain the crowd with metal barriers but they were quickly calmed down. Many of the protesters held up a three finger salute - adapted from the Hunger Games movie - and wore black shirts as a sign of mourning for democracy. There were then several speakers. Later in the evening they held up mobile phone lights in a show of solidarity against the regime before being dispersed by police shortly before midnight. Leaders vowed to stage further rallies in the coming weeks - in defiance of the country’s Covid-19 coronavirus ban on large gatherings.

entry.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations Episode 157 English SUB

link.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations Episode 157 English SUB

entry.content:
Following the successful end of the Fourth Shinobi World War, Konohagakure has been enjoying a period of peace, prosperity, and extraordinary technological advancement. This is all due to the efforts of the Allied Shinobi Forces and the village’s Seventh Hokage, Naruto Uzumaki. Now resembling a modern metropolis, Konohagakure has changed, particularly the life of a shinobi. Under the watchful eye of Naruto and his old comrades, a new generation of shinobi has stepped up to learn the ways of the ninja.
Boruto Uzumaki is often the center of attention as the son of the Seventh Hokage. Despite having inherited Naruto’s boisterous and stubborn demeanor, Boruto is considered a prodigy and is able to unleash his potential with the help of supportive friends and family. Unfortunately, this has only worsened his arrogance and his desire to surpass Naruto which, along with his father’s busy lifestyle, has strained their relationship. However, a sinister force brewing within the village may threaten Boruto’s carefree life.
New friends and familiar faces join Boruto as a new story begins in Boruto: Naruto Next Generations.
entry.summary: Following the successful end of the Fourth Shinobi World War, Konohagakure has been enjoying a period of peace, prosperity, and extraordinary technological advancement. This is all due to the efforts of the Allied Shinobi Forces and the village’s Seventh Hokage, Naruto Uzumaki. Now resembling a modern metropolis, Konohagakure has changed, particularly the life of a shinobi. Under the watchful eye of Naruto and his old comrades, a new generation of shinobi has stepped up to learn the ways of the ninja. Boruto Uzumaki is often the center of attention as the son of the Seventh Hokage. Despite having inherited Naruto’s boisterous and stubborn demeanor, Boruto is considered a prodigy and is able to unleash his potential with the help of supportive friends and family. Unfortunately, this has only worsened his arrogance and his desire to surpass Naruto which, along with his father’s busy lifestyle, has strained their relationship. However, a sinister force brewing within the village may threaten Boruto’s carefree life. New friends and familiar faces join Boruto as a new story begins in Boruto: Naruto Next Generations.

entry.title: FALSE: Helicopters to spray anti-COVID substances over Luzon

link.title: FALSE: Helicopters to spray anti-COVID substances over Luzon

entry.content:
A social media post says helicopters will fly over the entirety of Luzon to spray unspecified substances against the coronavirus. This claim is FALSE.

entry.title: Naagin 4 Get Ready For A Massive Face-Off Between Brinda And Shalakha

link.title: Naagin 4 Get Ready For A Massive Face-Off Between Brinda And Shalakha

entry.content: In the upcoming episode of Naagin 4, the game is set to change as Shalakha and Brinda will be having a massive showdown over a mystery pendent, who will win and who will lose, everything will be revealed in the coming episodes. Sharing the much awaited promo, the channel wrote, "Pyaar, badla aur sach ki iss jung mein khulenge kayeen raaz jo badal denge Brinda aur Dev ki zindagi humesha ke liye! Hoga kayeen rahasyon ka pardafash #Naagin: Bhagya Ka Zehreela Khel ke naye episodes mein, 18th July se, har Sat-Sun, raat 8 baje, sirf #Colors par. Anytime on @voot."
entry.summary: In the upcoming episode of Naagin 4, the game is set to change as Shalakha and Brinda will be having a massive showdown over a mystery pendent, who will win and who will lose, everything will be revealed in the coming episodes. Sharing the much awaited promo, the channel wrote, "Pyaar, badla aur sach ki iss jung mein khulenge kayeen raaz jo badal denge Brinda aur Dev ki zindagi humesha ke liye! Hoga kayeen rahasyon ka pardafash #Naagin: Bhagya Ka Zehreela Khel ke naye episodes mein, 18th July se, har Sat-Sun, raat 8 baje, sirf #Colors par. Anytime on @voot."

entry.title: 12 July History: क्यों India और World के इतिहास में आज के दिन का है खास महत्व वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: 12 July History: क्यों India और World के इतिहास में आज के दिन का है खास महत्व वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
12 July History: Know The Historical Significance of 12 July in Indian and World Context. July 12 is important for many reasons in the history of India and the world. Every day is very important in the history of India. If we look back in history then every day some special event has happened which has marked its status in history.
आज 12 जूलाई है। साल के सातवे महीने का ये बारहवां दिन इतिहास में अपनी एक खास जगह रखता है। आज के दिन देश-दुनिया में कई ऐसी घटनाएं हुई थीं जिसे जानना आपके लिए बेहद ज़रूरी है। तो आइए नज़र डालते हैं आज के इतिहास पर।
#12JulyHistory #12JulyIndianHistory #12July
entry.summary: 12 July History: Know The Historical Significance of 12 July in Indian and World Context. July 12 is important for many reasons in the history of India and the world. Every day is very important in the history of India. If we look back in history then every day some special event has happened which has marked its status in history. आज 12 जूलाई है। साल के सातवे महीने का ये बारहवां दिन इतिहास में अपनी एक खास जगह रखता है। आज के दिन देश-दुनिया में कई ऐसी घटनाएं हुई थीं जिसे जानना आपके लिए बेहद ज़रूरी है। तो आइए नज़र डालते हैं आज के इतिहास पर। #12JulyHistory #12JulyIndianHistory #12July

entry.title: Cathédrales : sécurité suffisante dans les monuments ?

link.title: Cathédrales : sécurité suffisante dans les monuments ?

entry.content:
Après l’incendie de Notre-Dame puis celui de la cathédrale de Nantes (Loire-Atlantique) se pose la question de la protection des grands monuments historiques. Aujourd’hui des systèmes modernes de protections sont installés sur de nombreux sites.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Après l’incendie de Notre-Dame puis celui de la cathédrale de Nantes (Loire-Atlantique) se pose la question de la protection des grands monuments historiques. Aujourd’hui des systèmes modernes de protections sont installés sur de nombreux sites. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Linkin Park en guerre contre Donald Trump, la Courneuve privée de fête de l’Huma et l’hommage de la Philarmonie de Paris à Renaud

link.title: Linkin Park en guerre contre Donald Trump, la Courneuve privée de fête de l’Huma et l’hommage de la Philarmonie de Paris à Renaud

entry.content:
ABONNEZ-VOUS pour plus de vidéos :
Dans ce "Journal de la culture", le groupe Linkin Park obtient la désactivation sur Twitter d’une vidéo de campagne de Donald Trump qui utilisait un de leurs tubes, le projet du DJ norvégien Kygo qui s’associe avec Tina Turner pour le remix de "What’s love got to do it", la fête de l’Huma prévue en septembre annulée à cause de l’épidémie de coronavirus, le chanteur Renaud au cœur d’une exposition en octobre à la Philarmonie de Paris, Ryan Gosling et Chris Evans réunis pour le tournage d’un film d’espionnage sur Netflix et le retour de la chanteuse australienne Julia Stones.
Retrouvez "Le journal de la culture " sur :
LE DIRECT :
Retrouvez-nous sur :
Notre site :
Facebook :
Twitter :
Google + :
Pinterest :
entry.summary: ABONNEZ-VOUS pour plus de vidéos : Dans ce "Journal de la culture", le groupe Linkin Park obtient la désactivation sur Twitter d’une vidéo de campagne de Donald Trump qui utilisait un de leurs tubes, le projet du DJ norvégien Kygo qui s’associe avec Tina Turner pour le remix de "What’s love got to do it", la fête de l’Huma prévue en septembre annulée à cause de l’épidémie de coronavirus, le chanteur Renaud au cœur d’une exposition en octobre à la Philarmonie de Paris, Ryan Gosling et Chris Evans réunis pour le tournage d’un film d’espionnage sur Netflix et le retour de la chanteuse australienne Julia Stones. Retrouvez "Le journal de la culture " sur : LE DIRECT : Retrouvez-nous sur : Notre site : Facebook : Twitter : Google + : Pinterest :

entry.title: 7 13 2020: Philadelphia Freedoms 25, OC Breakers 16

link.title: 7 13 2020: Philadelphia Freedoms 25, OC Breakers 16

entry.content: After two consecutive years of regular-season first-place finishes, the Philadelphia Freedoms kicked off their 2020 World TeamTennis season right where they left off, winning all five sets for a 25-16 win against the Orange County Breakers at The Greenbrier.
entry.summary: After two consecutive years of regular-season first-place finishes, the Philadelphia Freedoms kicked off their 2020 World TeamTennis season right where they left off, winning all five sets for a 25-16 win against the Orange County Breakers at The Greenbrier.

entry.title: Cette première du compte rendu du conseil des ministres est hautement symbolique

link.title: Cette première du compte rendu du conseil des ministres est hautement symbolique

entry.content: Pour rendre accessible le compte rendu du conseil des ministres à tous, Gabriel Attal s’entoure de deux interprètes en langue des signes.
entry.summary: Pour rendre accessible le compte rendu du conseil des ministres à tous, Gabriel Attal s’entoure de deux interprètes en langue des signes.

entry.title: Incendie de la cathédrale de Nantes : ‘Je devrais être au clavier pour préparer la messe’

link.title: Incendie de la cathédrale de Nantes : ‘Je devrais être au clavier pour préparer la messe’

entry.content:
Un incendie a gravement endommagé la cathédrale de Nantes, samedi 18 juillet, et notamment détruit son orgue du XVIIe siècle. Michel Boursier, l’un des trois organistes titulaires et le dernier à avoir joué sur l’instrument a partagé son émotion au micro d’Europe 1, Dimanche.
Retrouvez "La matinale d’Europe 1 - Le 6h30 - 9h" sur :
entry.summary: Un incendie a gravement endommagé la cathédrale de Nantes, samedi 18 juillet, et notamment détruit son orgue du XVIIe siècle. Michel Boursier, l’un des trois organistes titulaires et le dernier à avoir joué sur l’instrument a partagé son émotion au micro d’Europe 1, Dimanche. Retrouvez "La matinale d’Europe 1 - Le 6h30 - 9h" sur :

entry.title: Coronavirus - En se vantant fièrement de ne pas porter de masque dans le JT, des jeunes hommes énervent les internautes qui ne comprennent pas son discours

link.title: Coronavirus - En se vantant fièrement de ne pas porter de masque dans le JT, des jeunes hommes énervent les internautes qui ne comprennent pas son discours

entry.content:
C’est un passage d’un reportage de France 2 qui n’a pas vraiment plus aux téléspectateurs. Hier, plusieurs jeunes ont répondu aux questions sur le port du masque. Tout d’abord un jeune garçon avec une casquette répond fièrement aux questions des journalistes de la chaîne et explique qu’il ne porte pas de masque et qu’il l’assume : "Quand on va dans les bars, on ne prend pas de masque… On met pas de masques… (Rires) Quand on va au tacos on met pas de masque (rires)"
Puis ce sont deux autres jeunes hommes qui sont interrogés avec peu près le même discours: "Quand je rentre dans un magasin, je le mets mais autrement, je le porte jamais…" Bref, il y a encore beaucoup de travail à faire pour les autorités afin de convaincre les jeunes en particulier dfe porter les masques pour eux et pour les autres !
entry.summary: C’est un passage d’un reportage de France 2 qui n’a pas vraiment plus aux téléspectateurs. Hier, plusieurs jeunes ont répondu aux questions sur le port du masque. Tout d’abord un jeune garçon avec une casquette répond fièrement aux questions des journalistes de la chaîne et explique qu’il ne porte pas de masque et qu’il l’assume : "Quand on va dans les bars, on ne prend pas de masque… On met pas de masques… (Rires) Quand on va au tacos on met pas de masque (rires)" Puis ce sont deux autres jeunes hommes qui sont interrogés avec peu près le même discours: "Quand je rentre dans un magasin, je le mets mais autrement, je le porte jamais…" Bref, il y a encore beaucoup de travail à faire pour les autorités afin de convaincre les jeunes en particulier dfe porter les masques pour eux et pour les autres !

Voici Les 10 Images Marques Du Début Juillet

entry.title: Marchena se reúne con Milagros Germán, la próxima vocera de la Presidencia

link.title: Marchena se reúne con Milagros Germán, la próxima vocera de la Presidencia

entry.content: El actual director de Comunicaciones del Palacio Nacional, Roberto Rodríguez Marchena, se reunió con la próxima vocera de la Presidencia, la comunicadora Milagros Germán.
entry.summary: El actual director de Comunicaciones del Palacio Nacional, Roberto Rodríguez Marchena, se reunió con la próxima vocera de la Presidencia, la comunicadora Milagros Germán.

entry.title: Blanc Mesnil : armé d’un sabre et d’un fusil, il est interpellé en train de foncer sur des fêtards

link.title: Blanc Mesnil : armé d’un sabre et d’un fusil, il est interpellé en train de foncer sur des fêtards

entry.content: Un homme âgé de 32 ans a été interpellé dimanche matin au Blanc-Mesnil. Il a été volontairement percuté par un automobiliste pour le neutraliser alors qu’il fonçait, armé, sur un groupe de fêtards en hurlant « Allah akbar ».
entry.summary: Un homme âgé de 32 ans a été interpellé dimanche matin au Blanc-Mesnil. Il a été volontairement percuté par un automobiliste pour le neutraliser alors qu’il fonçait, armé, sur un groupe de fêtards en hurlant « Allah akbar ».

entry.title: Les 10 idées marketing de la semaine

link.title: Les 10 idées marketing de la semaine

entry.content: Au menu des 10 idées cette semaine : ALL piège les fans du PSG, Kanye West se présente à la présidentielle US, Monoprix dit "Oui" aux produits concurrents, Burger King utilise le passeport des suédois comme carte de fidélité et l'écurie Envision Virgin Racing se lance dans les courses de billes !
entry.summary: Au menu des 10 idées cette semaine : ALL piège les fans du PSG, Kanye West se présente à la présidentielle US, Monoprix dit "Oui" aux produits concurrents, Burger King utilise le passeport des suédois comme carte de fidélité et l&#39;écurie Envision Virgin Racing se lance dans les courses de billes !
